complaints.message:
Confirm object synset assignment.
Object assigned to synset: 
Definition: 
Reminder: synset should match the object and not its contents.
(e.g. orange juice bottle needs to match orange_juice__bottle.n.01
and not orange_juice.n.01)

Confirm object visual appearance.
Requirements:
- make sure there is only one rigid body.
- make sure the object has a valid texture or appearance.
- make sure the object has all parts necessary.
complaints.complaint: door looks weird but hard to tell here

complaints.message:
Confirm reasonable bounding box size:
1.49m, 57.92cm, 1.24m
Make sure these sizes are within the same order of magnitude you expect from this object IRL.

APPEARANCE: Confirm object visual appearance.
Requirements:
- make sure the object has a valid texture or appearance (e.g., texture not black,
       transparency rendered correctly, etc).
- make sure any glass parts are transparent (would this object contain glass? e.g.
       wall pictures, clocks, etc. - anything wrong)
- compare the object against the 3ds Max image that should open up now.
complaints.complaint: can't tell which orientation is the correct one
